titleStmt.title: SII 26.780: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 780. (A.R. No. 729 of 1909.) ĀLAMBĀKKAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of paddy at the rate of 4 nāḻi per mā of land in their village and its hamlets by the Veḷḷāḷars of Śrī-Madhurāntakach-chaturvvēdimaṅgalam, a Brahmadēyam, in Poygai-nāḍu in Vaḍakarai-Rājarājavaḷanāḍu, to provide for offerings and services in the temple of Śrīkayilāsamuḍaiya-mahādēvar of the village. There is an imprecatory passage warning those who tried to harm this gift. At the end is a Tamil verse containing the purport of the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājā
dhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu vaṭakarai rā
jarājavaḷanāṭṭup poykaināṭṭu bra
hmadeyam śrīmadhurāntakaccaturvvedimaṅka
lattu Ūrilum piṭākaiyilum Irukkum
veḷḷāḷarom Ivvūr śrīkailāsamuṭai
ya mahādevaṟkup pūjaikkum pala paṇi nimantaṅkaḷukkum
Uṭalāka nāṅkaḷ vaittuk kuṭuttapaṭi Ivvūr viḷainila
ttilum puṟaṇiyilum kaḷ komu
ḻaintu Uḻuta nilat Uḷ(ḷa)ppaṭa Orumā
nilattukku nāṉāḻi nellāka vanta nel
lu kārukkum maṟuvukkum Oru pūvukkum puṟa
ṇi varakukkum Uḻutāruḻutapaṭiye Itteva
r koyilile Aḷantu Aḷantamaikku I
kkoyilil śrīmāheśvarakkaṅkāṇi ce
yvārkaḷum tevakaṉmikaḷum koyil kaṇa
kkaṉum Eḻuttāl taravu koḷḷakkaṭavārkaḷā
kavum Ippaṭi veḷḷāḷarāy ceyyāta
maṟṟum kalappai piṭittu Uḻutu pa
ytu Itukku virotañ ceytāruḷarākil
5 vāṇaiyum śrīyājñaiyum maṟuttu periya
nāṭṭukkum piḻaittārākavum śrīmāhe
śvararum Eṅkaḷ paṇicamakkaḷum kaṇṭu
kiḷaiyakkaṭavarkaḷākavum nāṅkaḷ vait
tuk kuṭutta māttāl nāṉāḻi nellum canti
rātittavaṟ cellakkaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi
vaittuk kuṭuttom ....ippaṭi sabhaiyā
r ṉyokappaṭi ....cirārum tanti maṅkai cikaiyilāyattiṟaivar
perār celvam perukkutaṟku kārāḷar māttāl nāṉāḻi
vaittuk kuṭuttaṟa tātaikāttā kaittalatta
Digital edition of SII 26.780 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
